# Purpose

To make it easier to track what user eats to maintain strength, build strength or loose weight



# Common Rules

- Should in the end be usuable on multiple different devices such as mobile and desktop.
- Should minimize the amount of CSS required and instead utilize Bootstrap components and utility classes.

- Always try to reuse components between the different parts if possible
- Use the suggested code structure as a base but feel free to create more files and folders if needed but before you do suggest them to me. Folders you can create as you want.
- Use root.tsx as entrypoint and take help from the controllers to get data
